headline: CANADIAN BANC CORP. Monthly Dividend Declaration for Class A &  Preferred Share
summary: TORONTO, March 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Canadian Banc Corp. (The "Company") declares its monthly distribution of $0.18138 for each Class A share and $0.04958 for each Preferred share. Distributions are payable April 10, 2026 to shareholders on record as at March 31, 2026. Under the distribution policy announced in November 2021, the monthly dividend payable on the Class A shares is determined by applying a 15% annualized rate on the volume weighted average market price (VWAP) of the Class A

content.title: CANADIAN BANC CORP. Monthly Dividend Declaration for Class A &  Preferred Share
content.summary: TORONTO, March 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Canadian Banc Corp. (The "Company") declares its monthly distribution of $0.18138 for each Class A share and $0.04958 for each Preferred share. Distributions are payable April 10, 2026 to shareholders on record as at March 31, 2026. Under the distribution policy announced in November 2021, the monthly dividend payable on the Class A shares is determined by applying a 15% annualized rate on the volume weighted average market price (VWAP) of the Class A
